title: The Soldier's Consolation.
content:
No! in truth there's here no lack:
    White the bread, the maidens black!
    To another town, next night:
    Black the bread, the maidens white!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Johann Wolfgang von Goethe, titled "The Soldier's Consolation.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
